body: FarmThru CSF offer is live: {{birchal_url}} See the general CSF risk warning. Reply STOP.
creative_brief: Sent manually by founder/agency at the moment the CSF offer goes live on Birchal. The {{birchal_url}} expands to the canonical Birchal CSF risk-warning landing route. Recipient already knows what FarmThru is (they paid the $5 VIP deposit). Job: drive one tap. Tone: factual, calm, no hype. Single SMS segment after merge-tag expansion (~104 chars). The short paraphrase 'general CSF risk warning' satisfies the universal ADV-001 safe-harbour gate within the 160-char budget; the URL itself routes to the same canonical disclosures.
source: clients/farm-thru/CSF-VIP-COPY-PACKAGE.md §SMS round opens (compliance-revised: added 'See the general CSF risk warning' to satisfy ADV-001 + FMTH-001 within 160-char single-segment budget)
